# Fitness Tracker - Development Instructions

## Project Overview
A Flutter-based fitness tracker mobile application with a static UI showcasing daily activities, stats, and workouts.

## Project Structure
- `lib/main.dart` - Application entry point
- `lib/screens/` - Screen components (HomeScreen)
- `lib/widgets/` - Reusable widgets (StatsCard, ActivityRing, WorkoutCard)
- `lib/themes/` - Theme configuration and styling
- `pubspec.yaml` - Flutter dependencies and configuration
- `assets/` - App images and resources

## Getting Started
1. Ensure Flutter and Dart SDK are installed
2. Run: `flutter pub get` to install dependencies
3. Run: `flutter run` to launch the app

## Key Features (Current)
- Responsive home dashboard
- Daily activity progress rings
- Quick stats overview (Steps, Calories, Heart Rate, Water)
- Recent workouts list
- Bottom navigation bar
- Material Design 3 styling

## Next Steps
- Add analytics screen
- Implement goals management
- Add workout details view
- Connect to fitness data sources
- Add user profile/settings screens

## Development Notes
- Uses Material Design 3 via Flutter
- Poppins font family for typography
- Color scheme: Primary (Indigo), Secondary (Green), Accent (Amber)
- All components are currently static/UI-only
